rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(242, 242, 242), rgb(29, 29, 29)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 128, 0), rgb(206, 97, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(255, 128, 0), rgb(206, 97, 0));
fill: light-dark(rgb(153, 0, 0), rgb(255, 181, 181)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(153, 0, 0), rgb(255, 181, 181));
